rows.label: qev030102_MSG0002
rows.name:
For the sake of our kin who couldn't be saved like us,
the two of us will devote ourselves to training, become much stronger,
and take our revenge on the Cavern Clan, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030102_MSG0005
rows.name: Being the coward he is, I'm sure he must be sobbing in anxiety, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030102_MSG0006
rows.name:
Please, in place of this pathetic older brother,
go and save him. [ST:wait ]
